answer:
### Answer:
The non-profit organization founded in 1972 for the study of the work of the writer widely regarded as the greatest writer in the history of the English language is the Modern Language Association (MLA). The MLA is dedicated to the study of literature and language, and it was established to promote the study of literature and language through research, teaching, and publication. The organization was founded by a group of scholars who were interested in the study of literature and language, and they believed that a professional organization was necessary to promote the study of literature and language. The MLA has since grown to become one of the largest and most influential organizations in the field of literature and language, and it continues to play an important role in promoting the study of literature and language.
